pulse_body: This week, Play Store reviews highlight recurring friction across support, fees, and reliability. • High brokerage charges: Multiple users have reported that the brokerage charges are very high, which is a major concern for them. Some users have even mentioned that the charges are higher than what they expected, making it a significant issue. • Poor customer support: Some users have reported poor customer support, including unresponsive support agents and lack of help with resolving issues. • High brokerage fees: Multiple users have reported that the brokerage fees charged by Groww are very high, making it difficult for small investors to use the platform.
